PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION:$1,778.00 CURRENCY DOES 1 THROUGH 100 INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER COMPELLING ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

DISCOVERY 302, CLAIMANT DID NOT FILED AN OPPOSITION OR NOTIFY THE MOVING PARTY OF HIS INTENTIONS TO APPEAR AT THE HEARING. DISCUSSED AND PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND STRIKING THE CLAIM IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PRO TEM JUDGE: TRENT THORNLEY, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION ANBD INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL FORM OF INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED
